notes: full refname validation accepts a normal branch ref like stock Git
allow-onelevel accepts a single-component branch name like stock Git
normalize canonicalizes repeated and leading slashes like stock Git
branch shorthand accepts a simple branch name like stock Git
branch mode accepts a full heads ref like stock Git
full refname mode rejects one-level names like stock Git
rejects double-dot refnames like stock Git
rejects dot-prefixed path components like stock Git
rejects trailing-dot refnames like stock Git
normalize mode rejects trailing slashes like stock Git
branch mode rejects invalid shorthand branch names like stock Git
